title: First-guess command residuals
description:
Remove the remaining commands and flags that fail on the natural first guess.

## Success Criteria

- [hard] REQ-05: gate define --auto sets mode to auto; doc add --title is accepted as an alias for the human label; a gate-inspection call with the gate key and issue id transposed yields an actionable suggestion rather than a misparse; and a top-level reverse-dependency or issue-listing first guess resolves to the canonical command or an actionable error.
